ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data record */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Workclass of the individual (e.g., Private, Government) */,
  "fnlwgt" INTEGER /* Final weight of the individual (fnlwgt) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the individual (e.g., HS-grad, Some-college) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual (e.g., Widowed, Divorced) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual (e.g., Exec-managerial, Machine-op-inspct) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the individual (e.g., Not-in-family, Unmarried) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual (e.g., Female, Male) */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the individual */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income level of the individual (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metadata */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the individual */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Size of the household */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the individual */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the individual */,
  "voter_registration" TEXT /* Voter registration status of the individual */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_relationship FOREIGN KEY ("relationship") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_metadata_id FOREIGN KEY ("metadata_id") REFERENCES metadata ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_marital_status FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., HS-grad, Some-college) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "education_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education level */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, PhD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status (e.g., Widowed, Divorced) */,
  "marital_status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation (e.g., Exec-managerial, Machine-op-inspct) */,
  "occupation_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the occupation is in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship (e.g., Not-in-family, Unmarried) */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "data_usage_policy" TEXT /* Policy for using the data */,
  "data_access_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)
